title: iris demawendica
intro: Iris demawendica, also known as Demawend Iris, is a flowering plant species in the iris family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Iris demawendica include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Iris demawendica often include the root, which is dried and used in teas, tinctures, or powdered forms to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
